description: Composition White top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves that have elasticated and ruffled hems, tipped collar with a buttoned front placket, has a pintucked bib, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, a belt at the back, embroidered branding on the back neck and has a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron/do not iron on print or embroidery Get comfy and feel good in this white top from lee. The pintucked bib, belt at the back and elasticated sleeve hems add to it a feminine vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day - a perfect wear for a day when you are out shopping in the sun for necessities. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
